title: collinia fibrosa
intro: Collinia fibrosa, also known as Collinsonia, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Collinia fibrosa include relief from coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Collinia fibrosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
